banner: Website under construction. The app is already live — download it now and get started.

hero.subtitle: Solvymed brings scheduling, patient records, prescriptions, and payments together in one clean, fast app built for healthcare professionals.
hero.comingSoon: Download links coming soon — check back shortly.

features.heading: Everything your practice needs
features.sub: Built for clinicians and independent practitioners who want less admin work and more time with patients.
features.scheduling_desc: Full calendar view with daily, weekly, and monthly modes. Manage in-person and online appointments, block time, and send automated reminders.
features.patients_desc: Complete patient profiles with personal data, contact info, appointment history, and custom tags. Search and filter across your entire patient base.
features.records_desc: Timeline-based medical notes with rich text. Document each session, track patient evolution, and attach exams and files — all securely stored.
features.prescriptions_desc: Issue digital prescriptions in seconds. Maintain a personal medication library, customize templates, and send directly to patients.
features.payments_desc: Collect payments directly through the app. Send payment links to patients, manage installments, and track paid and pending sessions.
features.analytics_desc: Understand your practice at a glance. Revenue reports, appointment stats, patient growth — clear insights to help you run a better clinic.

cta.heading: Ready to simplify your practice?
cta.sub: The app is live and ready — download it now and have your practice running in minutes. The website is on the way.

construction.heading: Website under construction
construction.body: This website is a work in progress. The full Solvymed website is coming soon with detailed documentation, pricing, and support resources. In the meantime, the app is fully operational — download it and start managing your practice today.

confirm.openAppHint: If the app doesn't open automatically, tap the button above.
confirm.resetPasswordSub: Open the SolvyMed app to set a new password for your account.
confirm.errorSub: This link may have expired or already been used. Please try signing up again in the app.

book.title: Book Appointment
book.notesPlaceholder: Reason for visit, symptoms, questions for the doctor…
book.hint: The doctor will confirm or suggest a different time. You'll be notified either way.
book.successBody: Your request for {date} at {time} with {doctor} has been submitted.
book.successHint: The doctor will confirm or suggest a different time.
book.errorSlotTaken: This slot was just taken. Please choose another time.
book.errorBlocked: Your bookings with this professional are currently restricted. Please contact the clinic.
book.errorMaxBookings: You already have the maximum number of active appointments with this professional.
book.errorGeneric: Could not send booking request. Please try again.

discover.subtitle: Search by clinic name, city, doctor, or specialty

login.error: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start managing your practice today

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successSub: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.error: Could not update password. The link may have expired.
